content: Rendering polish after browser review: edge labels and semantic badges now follow the post-offset connector route rather than the pre-offset layout route. SVG routing exposes rendered edge visuals with the visible polyline, and normal edge annotations clamp near the visible segment so labels such as line target / live preview update message / active tab text remain tied to their connector. Added a local-first UI regression that checks labels stay close to rendered connector lines. Verification: npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts test/edges.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm test, npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
